title: Work Forms Issues
excerpt: Is anyone else experiencing Work Form issues? I have been experiencing several. Just today, questions are appearing on a form within the Monday.com Board. However, when my co-workers go to the Published link for the form…

posts.author: JHarrington (Jen H)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is anyone else experiencing Work Form issues? I have been experiencing several. Just today, questions are appearing on a form within the Monday.com Board. However, when my co-workers go to the Published link for the form, the questions are not there.
I also keep having issues with forms not letting me make changes to them and I am an Admin on the account.
Thank you.

posts.author: hobbit (wayne giles)
posts.cookedHtml: the only time i get this is if the columns on the board that they cant see are, hidden from them with the eye symbol next to them? hope this helps.
